---
title: "Approved Requests"
---


## Approved Data Access Requests"


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

url <- "https://hbm.vito.be/sites/hbm4eu/files/inline_ckeditor_uploads/Overview%20of%20approved%20requests%20and%20resulting%20publications_01102025.xlsx"

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".xlsx")
download.file(url, tmp, mode = "wb")

requests <- read_excel(tmp, sheet = "Approved requests")

requests |>
  arrange(desc(`Approval date`)) |>
  knitr::kable()
```
